nasb.text: That which came as the word of the Lord to Jeremiah the prophet concerning the Philistines, before Pharaoh conquered Gaza.

esv.text: The word of the Lord that came to Jeremiah the prophet concerning the Philistines, before Pharaoh struck down Gaza.

cnv.text: 在法老攻擊迦薩以先，耶和華論到非利士人的話臨到耶利米先知。

ccb.text: 在法老攻打迦萨之前，耶和华告诉了耶利米先知有关非利士人的事。
